_about: Declarative install manifest for the ~/.claude workbench (P6-T5). install.py + installer/{detect,deps,links,render,doctor}.py read this. Everything is idempotent + fail-visible. {PYTHON}/{NODE}/{CLAUDE_DIR} are substituted from installer/detect.py. `ci_stub:true` steps are SKIPPED under `install.py --ci` (no network in CI; the manifest itself is the contract the doctor asserts).

deps.note: PyYAML powers the skill validator's front-matter parser (R2/R5/R6/R10 fidelity). Runtime hooks are pure stdlib and never import it; skills_lib degrades to a stdlib fallback (no crash) when it is absent, but the doctor's R9/R10 probe needs it for full fidelity.
Code-intelligence MCP engine (PyPI: jcodemunch-mcp). Install via uv: `uv tool install jcodemunch-mcp` (or pipx on Windows). Info + licensing: https://j.gravelle.us/jCodeMunch/descriptions.php

Docs-index MCP engine (PyPI: jdocmunch-mcp), jCodeMunch's docs twin. Install via uv: `uv tool install jdocmunch-mcp` (or pipx on Windows); full wiring + first index: scripts/install-jdocmunch.sh. Info + licensing: https://j.gravelle.us/jCodeMunch/descriptions.php

mcp_servers.name: graphify
mcp_servers.note: portable python launcher — reconciles the settings.json/~/.claude.json graphify disagreement (audit §5).

links._about: Skill trees that must be MATERIALIZED as real files (never symlinks) so Windows works. On this workbench P5-T12 already de-symlinked everything (gstack pointers + higgsfield/mmx real dirs); links.materialize() is idempotent verify-or-create. The generator below is the source of truth for gstack pointers.

post_steps.note: regenerate gstack pointer skills from the clone (trigger parity).
R1..R10 incl. R9 floor guard + R10 upstream-intactness (fails the install on a broken catalog or an edited locked skill).
